classObjective: Determine the truth value of compound statements formed by conjunction and disjunction.
workedExamples: 12-2, Example 1 — Evaluate Conjunctions and Disjunctions (AND/OR Truth Tables)
12-2, Example 2 — Evaluate Negations of Compound Statements
warmUp: If p is true and q is false, what is p AND q? What is p OR q?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: AND/OR truth tables; conjunction and disjunction truth values; negation of compound statements
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice evaluating compound statements using truth tables
independentPractice: Practice problems determining truth value of compound statements
assessment: Exit ticket: determine whether '5 is odd AND 10 is even' is true or false
capReflection: How does the truth value of each component affect the truth value of a conjunction versus a disjunction?
